description: Processes each node independently and sums up the output.

parameterGroups.label: Crossover Frequencies
parameterGroups.rationale: Four crossover frequency parameters define the boundaries between five frequency bands. Each parameter routes to five LR filters (one per band) at that crossover point.

gaps.question: freq_split5 has 5 bands and 4 crossover parameters vs freq_split2's 2 bands and 1 crossover. Each crossover parameter connects to 5 LR filters (lr1_N through lr5_N). Is the internal logic identical to freq_split2 except for additional bands and crossovers?
gaps.context: If identical in structure, the doc can reference the base variant and note only the band count and parameter count difference.

notes: Variant of freq_splitN with N=5 (maximum). Four crossover parameters (Band 1 through Band 4) each connect to 5 LR filters. Default crossover frequencies: ~28 Hz, ~188 Hz, 1000 Hz, ~3445 Hz. This is the largest freq_split variant.
